name: carousel-api
visual_summary: The carousel API component is a scrolling view of multiple items displayed in a continuous sequence. It is commonly used in applications where a user can navigate through a series of images or cards. This component enables users to scroll through a collection of content and can be applied to various use cases such as product showcases or image galleries.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready carousel component with the following characteristics:

Name: carousel-api
Description: The carousel API component is a scrolling view of multiple items displayed in a continuous sequence. It is commonly used in applications where a user can navigate through a series of images or cards. This component enables users to scroll through a collection of content and can be applied to various use cases such as product showcases or image galleries.
Style: responsive, adaptive
Interactions: animated, draggable, swipe-enabled
Tags: carousel, gallery, scrolling-content

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
